title: Advanced Rocketry 3
body:
This is a continuation of Advanced Rocketry for modern minecraft.
This mod requires ARLib and Dynamic Dimension (AR Edition)

This mod is still in development, many things will be further refined and more stuff is to be added in future.

This mod is designed for customization in modpacks.
- You can design your own planets in the dimension properties (defaults included)
- You can configure asteroids for mining (defaults included)
- You can map any dimension (including modded dimensions) to a configured planet
- There will be only a few default recipes included in this mod

Build the large observatory to discover new planets, construct a rocket and send out satellites for analysis.
After collecting enough data you can land on the discovered planet. 
You can construct space stations and use them as base for asteroid and gas mining.

Maybe you can even make our moon habitable with enough gas and water?

A future planet event addon will allow for interesting scenario based modpacks, for example escaping a dying star. Other possible modpack goals could be terraforming a planet or escaping from a desert world back to earth.
